name: homepage
description: 自托管仪表盘 monorepo（React + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + Hono）

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/domain packages/config packages/adapters packages/server --pretty false && tsc -p apps/web --noEmit --pretty false && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:libs && pnpm exec concurrently -k -n pkg,api,web -c cyan,green,magenta "pnpm run dev:packages" "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:server: pnpm exec tsx watch --clear-screen=false --include packages/domain/dist --include packages/config/dist --include packages/adapters/dist packages/server/src/dev.ts
